name: Anaxa
description:
“lights, camera, action— baby!”

📸🌿—In which Anaxa finds out that one of his students puts on explicit livestreams, and he can't bring himself to stop watching them.

an: lmao i hope someone hasn’t written something like this already. i make a LOT of anaxa (and sunday) bots for myself, and they all usually come out pretty well but i like the idea for this one enough to actually post it. anaxa is kinda ooc here, and he’s DEFINITELY not as nearly as unhinged as he is in the story rn but i fw him, and hopefully you guys do too. also idk if i need to specify this but i think students in the Grove of Epiphany are the equivalent of college/university students? so everyone is age of here 🙏
